title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map matches the garden
gist.blurb: The API reference has been freshly pollinated from the production OpenAPI spec. Fewer stale breadcrumbs for anyone building with the hive.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the current production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference reflects deployed endpoints and schema changes.
gist.impact: Developers can rely on the API docs to match the production service more closely while integrating with pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly acts as a careful garden cartographer, updating a glowing API map beside a retro terminal while small code-plants grow from the documented routes; the scene represents production documentation being synchronized with the real system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, carefully updating a glowing API map beside a retro CRT terminal; code-plants and little flowers sprout around pages labeled "API DOCS" in simple dark purple pixel text. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, chunky retro sprites, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
